core_loop_signature: salvage scrap fuel and parts during prep, build and upgrade sector defenses around a circular outpost, rotate command focus to stressed sectors, survive zombie night waves, then reinvest rewards into stronger perimeter tools
differentiation_axes: circular four-sector perimeter instead of linear lanes
sector focus management instead of always-on global defense
contextual build slots and breach recovery instead of path-only tower placement
inner command yard collapse pressure instead of endpoint leak count only
prep phase plus assault phase rhythm instead of uninterrupted spawn loop
forbidden_template_reuse: copying the same tower roster from prior defense projects

map_content_budget.play_area_model: one circular survivor outpost with four named outer sectors, four breach gates, one inner command yard, and scenario utility nodes around the ring
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: minimum nine regions: four outer sectors, four breach gates, and one inner command yard, plus scenario utility or salvage nodes
map_content_budget.decorative_prop_count: at least sixteen props outside critical tap zones
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: landscape board with the full circular outpost visible inside a reserved HUD-safe viewport

special_rules: inner yard loss if breaches remain unchecked
scenario modifiers such as blackout fog or acid rain
risk_reward_systems: investing in outer utility nodes weakens immediate defense but improves future economy
trap-heavy builds save ammo but can fail against elites
gun-heavy builds solve burst pressure but strain parts and repair needs
saving focus skill charges can prevent catastrophic breaches later

secondary_game_art_packs: warning light and hazard prop set
asset_variety_budget.ui_pack: skin_post_apocalypse with tracked tactical scrap refinements
asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: at least six enemy families, six defense families, four utility or prop families, and four combat effect families
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: do not reuse fantasy wall-defense, medieval castle, or side-view lane-battle asset families as the main visual identity
